title: Cirrus: Invalidate static cache on VM image update
body:
Fixes: #8313

It's important to periodically update the nix cache (about 1GB in size).
If not, it can grow stale and has been observed causing task failures.
Associating the nix cache update with a VM/Container image update,
ensures it happens first in PRs where environment-related failures
are less surprising.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @hswong3i and @mheon  PTAL, I think this is ready.  I see [the image tag appears at the top of the content](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5166475365318656?command=nix#L1), along with the other content from which the cache-key is derived.
